mapper.select: SELECT g.*, s.name AS student_name, c.course_name FROM t_grade g LEFT JOIN t_student s ON g.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN t_course c ON g.course_id = c.id WHERE g.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_grade (student_id, course_id, score, exam_date) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{courseId}, #{score}, #{examDate})
mapper.select: SELECT g.student_id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.class_name AS className, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS avgScore, ROUND(SUM(g.score), 1) AS totalScore, COUNT(g.id) AS courseCount FROM t_grade g INNER JOIN t_student s ON g.student_id = s.id WHERE g.course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY g.student_id, s.name, s.student_no, s.class_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC

SELECT g.student_id AS studentId, s.name AS studentName, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.class_name AS className, ROUND(AVG(g.score), 1) AS avgScore, ROUND(SUM(g.score), 1) AS totalScore, COUNT(g.id) AS courseCount FROM t_grade g INNER JOIN t_student s ON g.student_id = s.id GROUP BY g.student_id, s.name, s.student_no, s.class_name ORDER BY avgScore DESC
